title: gh#21: Bug: MediaStatusPoller never updates parent state after transcode completes
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/21.
Backlog section: Bugs.

## Problem

MediaStatusPoller in MediaThumbnailGrid.tsx fires useMediaStatus queries that populate the TanStack Query cache, but handleStatusUpdate is an empty no-op. The parent's mediaItems state holds transcodeStatus as a snapshot from upload time — it never updates when transcoding completes or fails. The submit button stays permanently disabled with "Video is still transcoding."

## Identified by

Code quality review Run 3 — web comprehensive review (H-1)

## Fix

Either propagate handleStatusUpdate to call setMediaItems in the parent, or have MediaThumbnailGrid read transcode status directly from the TanStack Query cache and merge with props-based mediaItems.

## Files

- `packages/web/src/components/posts/MediaThumbnailGrid.tsx:86-127`
- `packages/web/src/pages/posts/NewPostPage.tsx`
- `packages/web/src/pages/posts/EditPostPage.tsx`
